title: BigBear.ai Reports Q1 Revenue of $34.4M, Gross Margin Expansion
text: BigBear.ai reported Q1 2026 results with flat revenue but significant gross margin expansion. Revenue of $34.4 million was relatively flat year-over-year compared to $34.8 million in Q1 2025, primarily due to lower volume on Army programs that was substantially offset by revenue attributable to the Ask Sage acquisition which closed in Q4 2025. Gross margin expanded dramatically to 34.0% from 21.3% year-over-year, a gain of approximately 1,278 basis points driven by increased volume from Ask Sage's higher-margin GenAI Platforms and Products. Despite the flat revenue and net loss of $56.8 million, the margin improvement was seen as a significant positive signal for the company's future profitability path.
